'''sathozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oibara|oibara]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-th-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oibara|oibara]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sathozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæthezheth|sæthezheth]] || [[word:sæthezhej|sæthezhej]] || [[word:sæthezhesh|sæthezhesh]] || [[word:sæthezhe|sæthezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sathothozhoth|sathothozhoth]] || [[word:sathothozhoj|sathothozhoj]] || [[word:sathothozhosh|sathothozhosh]] || [[word:sathothozho|sathothozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sathozhoth|sathozhoth]] || [[word:sathozhoj|sathozhoj]] || [[word:sathozhosh|sathozhosh]] || [[word:sathozho|sathozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sathofzhofth|sathofzhofth]] || [[word:sathofzhofj|sathofzhofj]] || [[word:sathofzhofsh|sathofzhofsh]] || [[word:sathofzhof|sathofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sathozhotho|sathozhotho]] || [[word:sathozhojo|sathozhojo]] || [[word:sathozhosho|sathozhosho]] || [[word:sathozhoko|sathozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sathozhoth|sathozhoth]] || [[word:sathozhoj|sathozhoj]] || [[word:sathozhosh|sathozhosh]] || [[word:sathozho|sathozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sathozhothol|sathozhothol]] || [[word:sathozhojol|sathozhojol]] || [[word:sathozhoshol|sathozhoshol]] || [[word:sathozhokol|sathozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sathozhoothotho|sathozhoothotho]] || [[word:sathozhoojojo|sathozhoojojo]] || [[word:sathozhooshosho|sathozhooshosho]] || [[word:sathozhooko|sathozhooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sathozhothon|sathozhothon]] || [[word:sathozhojon|sathozhojon]] || [[word:sathozhoshon|sathozhoshon]] || [[word:sathozhokon|sathozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sathozhothooro|sathozhothooro]] || [[word:sathozhojooro|sathozhojooro]] || [[word:sathozhoshooro|sathozhoshooro]] || [[word:sathozhokooro|sathozhokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
